output.desc: True iff the paper proposes or evaluates a method that takes a degraded or low-quality image (or video) and produces a higher-quality / cleaner version. Includes super-resolution, denoising, deraining, dehazing, inpainting, deblurring, JPEG-artifact removal, face restoration, video frame interpolation, low-light enhancement. False for pure text-to-image generation, unconditional image synthesis, aesthetic style transfer, and domain-translation i2i that does not target quality recovery.
